extraction_notes: Company name and fiscal year identified from report title and page 4/6. All financial figures are consolidated. Revenue growth calculated from FY25 and FY24 figures provided in highlights. PBT is explicitly stated as 'before exceptional items' in the Chairman's message. EBITDA margin is calculated using the provided EBITDA and Group revenue figures. Only one director identified (Chairman's message) as the 'Board of Directors' section (Page 14 as per contents) was not provided in the text. Depreciation and Finance Cost were not explicitly stated and cannot be individually computed from the given summary figures (EBITDA and PBT).
extraction_method: VectorLess RAG — Split two-call + notes extraction
